rootCause: The hand-crank-generator quest could be blocked by a non-tradeable DC motor because quest completable tests treated BETA_PLACEHOLDER items as implicitly obtainable and did not include dialogue-path required items in completion simulation.
resolution: Set an explicit price on the 12 V DC motor (6caa08d8-815c-4a0e-9297-0fda4516659d), include dialogue-path requirements in quest completion simulation, and add a focused regression test for hand-crank generator finish-path obtainability.
